message:
feat(core): migrate 40+ hard-coded constants to TuningConfig (T4-T7, T11)

Batch migration of constants across 18 source files to reference
TuningConfig DEFAULT_ associated consts as single source of truth:

T4.1: ingest.rs DEFAULT_MAX_PERSIST_SEGMENT_BYTES, tantivy_ingest.rs
  MAX_RECORD_PAYLOAD, recorder_lexical_ingest.rs DEFAULT_WRITER_MEMORY_BYTES
T4.3: query_contract.rs SEARCH_LIMIT_DEFAULT/MAX, storage.rs
  SAVED_SEARCH_DEFAULT_LIMIT, cass.rs DEFAULT_CASS_EXPORT_LIMIT
T4.4: wezterm.rs DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_SECS/RETRY_DELAY_MS, unified
  STATE_DETECTION_MAX_AGE from agent_correlator.rs + snapshot_engine.rs
T5.1: policy.rs RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW, recorder_audit.rs retention/TTL/rows,
  replay_artifact_registry.rs/replay_shadow_rollout.rs retention days
T5.2: rate_limit_tracker.rs MAX_TRACKED_PANES/EVENTS_PER_PANE,
  cost_tracker.rs MAX_TRACKED_PANES
T6.3: workflows/descriptors.rs all 5 descriptor limits
T7: web.rs all 8 API/streaming constants
T11.1: Added associated_consts_match_default_impl() test

All constants use identical values to prior hard-coded ones. The
tuning_config::Default impls reference the associated consts, and
the module-level consts reference the same consts, creating a single
source of truth for each value.

Validation: rch cargo check -p frankenterm-core --no-default-features => exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
